synopsis:
The war between Crimson Dawn and the Sith reaches its climax at the Amaxine Station, where Emperor Palpatine and Darth Vader arrive in person to seize the Fermata Cage. Lady Qi'ra uses her soldiers as a smoke screen so the Archivist can activate the artifact, but her true plan is a trap: the Cage is not connected to the Force at all, and its trigger "time-locks" both Sith Lords inside a stasis field. Qi'ra orders the Cage sealed and cast into a star to end the Sith forever.

The Knights of Ren, watching from the *Night Buzzard*, betray Qi'ra, believing the Emperor will eventually escape and punish those who opposed him. Their attack damages the machinery and breaks the stasis field. Freed, Palpatine unleashes Force lightning on the Knights, and with Admiral Piett's fleet destroying her forces, Qi'ra orders her surviving operatives to scatter and find new lives.

Years later, after the Battle of Endor, Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa reflect on Qi'ra's legacy: two of her agents supplied the intelligence on the second Death Star, and her secret war kept Palpatine distracted long enough for the Rebel fleet to prevail. In a final scene, an aged, hooded Qi'ra sits alone in a cantina, listening to news of the Emperor's death and the Rebellion's victory.
title: Hidden Empire #5
